item.title: WholeClear NSF To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear NSF To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter
(Utilities)
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter is the most famous software solution for Lotus Notes to Outlook Conversion. It has several crucial features that make it's too unique and advanced compared to others. It converts the entire data from HCL Lotus Notes NSF files to Outlook PST files format with Emails, Calendars, Tasks, Notes, Contacts, Journals, Tasks, etc. it can export single as well as multiple NSF files to Outlook PST at once without wasting too much time, and without losing any data. The software is fully tested by all kinds of online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use and understandable for any type of expert or non-expert user. In addition, it works with all online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use for users' systems and data. It supports all versions of Outlook and Lotus Notes and even operates with all Windows edits up to 11. For user satisfaction, we also offer a free demo to all users to export the initial 25 items from NSF files to Outlook PST free.
Visit Here:- https://www.wholeclear.com/nsf/pst/
[read more]
item.description:
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter
(Utilities)
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter is the most famous software solution for Lotus Notes to Outlook Conversion. It has several crucial features that make it's too unique and advanced compared to others. It converts the entire data from HCL Lotus Notes NSF files to Outlook PST files format with Emails, Calendars, Tasks, Notes, Contacts, Journals, Tasks, etc. it can export single as well as multiple NSF files to Outlook PST at once without wasting too much time, and without losing any data. The software is fully tested by all kinds of online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use and understandable for any type of expert or non-expert user. In addition, it works with all online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use for users' systems and data. It supports all versions of Outlook and Lotus Notes and even operates with all Windows edits up to 11. For user satisfaction, we also offer a free demo to all users to export the initial 25 items from NSF files to Outlook PST free.
Visit Here:- https://www.wholeclear.com/nsf/pst/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter
(Utilities)
WholeClear NSF To PST Converter is the most famous software solution for Lotus Notes to Outlook Conversion. It has several crucial features that make it's too unique and advanced compared to others. It converts the entire data from HCL Lotus Notes NSF files to Outlook PST files format with Emails, Calendars, Tasks, Notes, Contacts, Journals, Tasks, etc. it can export single as well as multiple NSF files to Outlook PST at once without wasting too much time, and without losing any data. The software is fully tested by all kinds of online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use and understandable for any type of expert or non-expert user. In addition, it works with all online scanners and antiviruses, so it's safe to use for users' systems and data. It supports all versions of Outlook and Lotus Notes and even operates with all Windows edits up to 11. For user satisfaction, we also offer a free demo to all users to export the initial 25 items from NSF files to Outlook PST free.
Visit Here:- https://www.wholeclear.com/nsf/pst/
[read more]

item.title: Game of Fifteen [Board]
item.itunes:title: Game of Fifteen [Board]
item.itunes:author: FabioMux
item.itunes:summary:
Game of Fifteen
(Board)
This is a revisiting of the popular game with a minimalistic interface.
The game is based on numbered tiles that slide on a board in order to create an ordered disposition from 1 to 15, leaving the empty cell in the right-bottom corner.

The included features allow to:
- restart the current game;
- start a new game leaving the current one;
- to have all the instances generated checked to be solvable;
- to count the number of moves to win;
- record the elapsed, effective, time;
- save and restore the last incomplete match;
- restart or resume the old games, visualizing the latest status.
[read more]
item.description:
Game of Fifteen
(Board)
This is a revisiting of the popular game with a minimalistic interface.
The game is based on numbered tiles that slide on a board in order to create an ordered disposition from 1 to 15, leaving the empty cell in the right-bottom corner.

The included features allow to:
- restart the current game;
- start a new game leaving the current one;
- to have all the instances generated checked to be solvable;
- to count the number of moves to win;
- record the elapsed, effective, time;
- save and restore the last incomplete match;
- restart or resume the old games, visualizing the latest status.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Game of Fifteen
(Board)
This is a revisiting of the popular game with a minimalistic interface.
The game is based on numbered tiles that slide on a board in order to create an ordered disposition from 1 to 15, leaving the empty cell in the right-bottom corner.

The included features allow to:
- restart the current game;
- start a new game leaving the current one;
- to have all the instances generated checked to be solvable;
- to count the number of moves to win;
- record the elapsed, effective, time;
- save and restore the last incomplete match;
- restart or resume the old games, visualizing the latest status.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.title: Drive Regainer Utility for FAT [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Drive Regainer Utility for FAT [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Drive Regainer Utility for FAT
(Utilities)
Highly effective File rescue application is designed by expert person to retrieve lost evidence from mass storage media. File undelete tool provides preview facility to view all lost files before final recovery and save it to user's specified location in computer. Economical FAT Drive Recovery Software exists at www.driverecoverysoftware.org is used to recover pictures, mp3, mp4 songs, text documents etc from hard disk drive on FAT 32 file system without any technical guidance.
[read more]

item.title: Bank Barcode Label Generator Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Bank Barcode Label Generator Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesystem
item.itunes:summary:
Bank Barcode Label Generator Software
(Office Apps)
Download sophisticated Bank Barcode Label Generator Software for desktop which is embedded with modern designing objects like pencil, arc, lines, rectangle, triangle etc that helps in customizing barcode images as needed. Professionally designed inventory barcode making tool is capable of developing 2D and linear barcodes.

[read more]

item.title: GODSPEED NOROR [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED NOROR [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. NOROR offers a wide range of features and functionalities that enhance the performance and efficiency of Android devices without the need for root access.
One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. NOROR offers a wide range of features and functionalities that enhance the performance and efficiency of Android devices without the need for root access.
One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]

item.title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Require application for instant and effective retrieval of deleted or missing multimedia files from memory devices? Now company launched new File Recovery Software enabled with features to regain deleted, formatted and even corrupted files, pictures and images from non-removable memory devices such as laptop and computer etc, for trusted downloads visit www.filerecoverysoftware.biz URL. Data rescue application retrieves accidentally erased, corrupted or formatted files like pictures, files and documents.

[read more]
item.description:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Require application for instant and effective retrieval of deleted or missing multimedia files from memory devices? Now company launched new File Recovery Software enabled with features to regain deleted, formatted and even corrupted files, pictures and images from non-removable memory devices such as laptop and computer etc, for trusted downloads visit www.filerecoverysoftware.biz URL. Data rescue application retrieves accidentally erased, corrupted or formatted files like pictures, files and documents.

[read more]
